name: recorded: low-confidence transcript extraction flags review (pulled pork)

structured.title: 3 Ingredient Slow Cooker Pulled Pork
directions: Season the pork aggressively with salt on all sides and place in the slow cooker.
Blend the chipotles with the orange juice and pour over the pork.
Cook on low for 8 hours without opening the lid.
Shred the pork in its juices with two forks.
Spread on a sheet pan and broil 5 minutes for crispy edges.

notes.title: Storage
notes.text: Freezes well; reheat under the broiler to re-crisp.
